reference: Hello, welcome to HealthcareMagic. According to the history, your uncle seems to be suffering from a depressive illness. Only medical therapy from a psychiatrist may not be very useful. In addition, relaxation exercises, engaging in activities one enjoys, involvement in social activities, and connections with relatives may help. Have a healthful day.
text: Hello, welcome to Healthcare Magic. According to the history, your uncle seems to be suffering from a depressive illness; only medical therapy from a psychiatrist may not be very useful. In addition, relaxation exercises, engaging in activities one enjoys, involvement in social activities, and connections with relatives may help. Have a healthful day.
